column8: Bob was 12 years old. He wasn't the world's____________boy, but he really didn't like helping out around the house. (LAZY)
column9: Ever since he was young, his parents had tired to get________to tidy his room, for example, but Bob simply wouldn't do it. (HE)
column10: By the time he was twelve, though, his mother was fed up. She decided that Bob___________to do his share of the work. (HAVE)
column11: She__________Bob watching TV, and said, "I need you to help us with the housework", Bob looked at her. (FIND)
column12: "Your brothers and sisters do all___________chores", she said, "so why can't you?" (THEY)
column13: Bob really didn't have a good answer. He could see that his mother was angry, and he didn't want to make the situation ___________ . (BAD)
column14: So, he just agreed to try___________and asked what he could do to help. (HARD)
column15: His mother thought about it for a minute. "You can help your father in the garden", she said. "You can collect all the______________that have fallen on the grass". (LEAF)
column16: Bob wished he____________, because he hated gardening more than he hated housework. It was going to be a long afternoon. (NO ASK)
column17: Igor Stravinsky is a very famous Russian composer. He___________up in St Petersburg at the end of the 19th century. (BRING)
column18: Although Stravinsky loved music, his parents wanted him to devote__________to becoming a lawyer instead. (HE)
column19: But after four years of______________law, Stravinsky decided to take his music career seriously. (STUDY)
column20: Rimsky-Korsakov gave him private lessons for several years, and the two____________close friends. (BECOME)
column21: Some people believe Stravinsky was the_____________composer of the last century. (IMPORTANT)
column22: At the first performance of his ballet The Rite of Spring, the audience_____________very angry. (GET)
column23: They were shocked by the rhythm of the music and how much___________it was than most ballet music. (LOUD)
column24: Since then, people______________their opinion about Stravinsky's music and now recognize how wonder it is. (CHANGE)
column25: Stravinsky lived in New York in his final years and___________there at age of 88 in 1971. (DIE)
